items.name: Astral Dimension Wings
items.description:
Texture created by LapzNetG:
https://roblox.com/users/123244139

These celestial wings pair especially well with blue, teal, and green attire, making them the perfect addition to any galaxy or winter holiday outfit. Whether you're a fairy, butterfly, mermaid, or even just wearing your favorite look, the Astral Dimension Wings will add a dash of starlight to your ROBLOX avatar! 

These were made in collaboration with AlexAstral based on a pair of wings from his upcoming project Charmlands--a magic universe where fairies, mermaids, butterflies, angels, and many other magical beings exist in a rainbow of harmony.

You can learn more about it here:
https://roblox.com/users/3501880
